summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Faculty CRM 4-feature implementation. All features working correctly: 1) WhatsApp webhook with new/returning lead greeting and name registration, 2) Automatic lead staging from conversation keywords, 3) New stage names (En Negociacion, Perdido instead of Lead Caliente/Lead Frio), 4) Chat delete message and conversation. Also tested: PDF quotations, bulk Excel download with new stages.
passed_tests: Login with admin@faculty.com / admin123 - SUCCESS
Dashboard shows new stage names: Nuevo, Interesado, En Negociacion, Cliente Nuevo, Cliente Activo, Perdido
POST /api/whatsapp/webhook - new lead greeting and name request - SUCCESS
POST /api/whatsapp/webhook - name registration for existing lead - SUCCESS
POST /api/whatsapp/webhook - returning lead greeting with stage auto-update - SUCCESS
POST /api/whatsapp/webhook - auto-stage to 'interesado' on price inquiry - SUCCESS
POST /api/whatsapp/webhook - auto-stage to 'en_negociacion' on quotation request - SUCCESS
POST /api/whatsapp/webhook - auto-stage to 'perdido' on rejection - SUCCESS
DELETE /api/chat/messages/{message_id} endpoint - SUCCESS
DELETE /api/chat/sessions/{session_id} endpoint - SUCCESS
PUT /api/leads/{lead_id}/stage endpoint - SUCCESS
PUT /api/leads/{lead_id}/stage with invalid stage returns 400 - SUCCESS
POST /api/quotations - create quotation - SUCCESS
Quotation creation updates lead stage to 'en_negociacion' - SUCCESS
GET /api/quotations/{id}/pdf - PDF download - SUCCESS
GET /api/bulk/download with new stage names - SUCCESS
Dashboard page UI - shows all 6 new stages correctly
Leads page - stage filter and change dropdown show new stages
Chat page - delete message button visible on hover
Chat page - delete conversation button working
Chat AI responds via GPT-5.2 with lead auto-registration
Quotations page - list, create form, PDF download buttons working
Bulk page - download stage options show new stage names
seed_data_creation: WhatsApp webhook tests created test leads with TEST prefix in phone numbers
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 requested features implemented and tested: WhatsApp webhook logic, auto-staging, renamed stages, chat delete. Backend uses FUNNEL_STAGES = ['nuevo', 'interesado', 'en_negociacion', 'cliente_nuevo', 'cliente_activo', 'perdido']. Old stages 'caliente' and 'frio' have been migrated. Chat AI uses GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM Key.
